prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 high-detail anime-style portrait of a handsome young adult man, an elegant dark-haired nobleman, leaning against a dark wooden doorway with his arms crossed. He has tousled layered deep navy blue hair with violet highlights, sharp refined facial features, pale skin, a calm confident expression, and heterochromatic eyes: one vivid blue eye and one golden amber eye. Dress him in a dark charcoal button-up shirt with the collar open and sleeves rolled to the forearms, plus a fitted brown-black brocade waistcoat with subtle ornate floral patterns and brass buttons. The pose should show the upper body from about mid-thigh to head, slightly angled toward the viewer, with strong shoulders and crossed forearms in the foreground. Set the scene at a rustic old European-style café or mansion entrance, with carved wooden panels on the right, an arched exterior wall, ivy greenery, and exactly one vintage hanging lantern glowing softly on the left. Use warm late-afternoon sunlight streaming from the left/back, creating golden rim light on the hair and face, soft shadows across the clothing, and a romantic cinematic atmosphere. Background should be softly blurred with hints of a balcony, street, and building architecture beyond the doorway. Render with polished fantasy romance light-novel cover quality, intricate linework, painterly shading, luminous eyes, detailed fabric texture, realistic hands, dramatic composition, and no text or watermark.
promptEn: Create a vertical 9:16 high-detail anime-style portrait of a handsome young adult man, an elegant dark-haired nobleman, leaning against a dark wooden doorway with his arms crossed. He has tousled layered deep navy blue hair with violet highlights, sharp refined facial features, pale skin, a calm confident expression, and heterochromatic eyes: one vivid blue eye and one golden amber eye. Dress him in a dark charcoal button-up shirt with the collar open and sleeves rolled to the forearms, plus a fitted brown-black brocade waistcoat with subtle ornate floral patterns and brass buttons. The pose should show the upper body from about mid-thigh to head, slightly angled toward the viewer, with strong shoulders and crossed forearms in the foreground. Set the scene at a rustic old European-style café or mansion entrance, with carved wooden panels on the right, an arched exterior wall, ivy greenery, and exactly one vintage hanging lantern glowing softly on the left. Use warm late-afternoon sunlight streaming from the left/back, creating golden rim light on the hair and face, soft shadows across the clothing, and a romantic cinematic atmosphere. Background should be softly blurred with hints of a balcony, street, and building architecture beyond the doorway. Render with polished fantasy romance light-novel cover quality, intricate linework, painterly shading, luminous eyes, detailed fabric texture, realistic hands, dramatic composition, and no text or watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张 9:16 竖屏高细节动漫风格肖像，主角是一位英俊的年轻男性，一位优雅的黑发贵族，双臂交叉倚靠在深色木门框边。他留着凌乱的层次感 深海军蓝发色，带有紫罗兰色挑染，面部轮廓锋利精致，皮肤白皙，表情冷静自信，拥有一双异色瞳：一只鲜艳的蓝色眼睛和一只金琥珀色眼睛。身穿深炭灰色衬衫，领口敞开，袖子卷至前臂，外搭一件修身的棕黑色锦缎马甲，饰有精致的暗花纹和黄铜纽扣。构图应展示从大腿中部到头部的上半身，身体略微朝向观众，肩膀宽阔，交叉的前臂位于前景。场景设定在 一家质朴的欧式老咖啡馆或宅邸入口，右侧有雕花木板，背景为拱形外墙，点缀着常春藤绿植，左侧悬挂着一盏散发柔和光芒的复古灯笼。利用从左后方射入的温暖午后阳光，在头发和面部勾勒出金色轮廓光，衣物上投下柔和阴影，营造出浪漫的电影氛围。背景应进行柔焦处理，隐约可见门外的阳台、街道和建筑结构。渲染效果需达到精致的奇幻浪漫轻小说封面水准，线条细腻，笔触感阴影，眼睛明亮，织物纹理清晰，手部真实，构图具有戏剧性，且画面中不含任何文字或水印。
